title: The Summit at Golden Hour
bodyText: We started the ascent at 3am to catch the light. Worth every step.

photos.alt: Rocky trail leading up the ridge

title: Mist Rolling Through the Pines
bodyText: Dense pine forest with morning fog — the kind of quiet that feels earned.

photos.alt: Dense pine forest with morning fog

title: High Tide at Crescent Beach
bodyText: Turquoise waves, salt air, and nobody else on the sand at 6am.

photos.alt: Turquoise ocean waves crashing on shore

title: Downtown Lights After Midnight
bodyText: City skyline reflected in the river. The stillness after last call is something else.

photos.alt: City skyline reflected in a river at night

title: Sahara at Midday
bodyText: Red sand dunes stretching to the horizon. The heat was surreal.

photos.alt: Red sand dunes stretching to the horizon

title: Hidden Falls Deep in the Rainforest
bodyText: Two hours off-trail to find it. A waterfall nobody had named yet.

photos.alt: Tall waterfall cascading into a jungle pool
